title: Video: Dutch speed skater in tears after 1,000-meter crash at Olympic qualifier
title_zh: 视频：荷兰速滑运动员在奥运资格赛1000米比赛中摔倒后泪流满面
description: Dutch speed skater Jutta Leerdam left the ice in tears Friday after falling during the 1,000 meters at the Olympic qualifying tournament in Thialf, ending her chance for direct qualification for th
description_zh: 荷兰速滑运动员尤塔·莱尔丹周五在蒂亚尔夫举行的奥运资格赛1000米比赛中摔倒，泪洒冰面，失去了直接晋级奥运会的机会。

title: Massive fire forces evacuation in Hengelo apartment building
title_zh: 亨格洛公寓楼发生大规模火灾，人员被迫疏散
description: A large fire broke out early Saturday in a flat building on Nico Werkmanstraat in Hengelo, prompting an immediate evacuation, authorities reported.
description_zh: 据当局报道，周六凌晨，亨厄洛尼科·沃克曼街的一栋公寓楼发生大火，导致人员立即疏散。

title: Dutch police open second probe into dark web murder orders targeting ordinary citizens
title_zh: 荷兰警方对暗网上针对普通公民的谋杀指令展开第二轮调查。
description: Dutch police have opened a second criminal investigation into murder-for-hire orders placed via the dark web, expanding an earlier probe in Rotterdam to include a separate suspected murder order in
description_zh: 荷兰警方已对通过暗网下达的雇凶杀人指令展开第二项刑事调查，扩大了此前在鹿特丹进行的调查范围，将另一起涉嫌雇凶杀人案件也纳入其中。

title: Dutch 6-year-old and 19-year-old severely injured in separate Tirol ski accidents
title_zh: 两名荷兰男子，一名6岁，一名19岁，在蒂罗尔州的两起滑雪事故中均受重伤。
description: Two Dutch tourists—a 6-year-old girl and a 19-year-old man—sustained serious injuries in separate skiing incidents in Tirol, Austria, on Thursday, Christmas Day, authorities reported.
description_zh: 据当局报道，周四（圣诞节当天），两名荷兰游客——一名 6 岁女孩和一名 19 岁男子——在奥地利蒂罗尔州滑雪时分别发生严重事故。

title: Fewer Dutch switch health insurers as premiums stay flat, price gaps widen for 2026
title_zh: 预计到2026年，荷兰更换健康保险公司的人数将减少，保费将保持不变，价格差距将扩大。
description: Fewer people in the Netherlands are switching health insurers this year, even as the price gap between the cheapest and most expensive policies grows significantly, according to comparison site Zor
description_zh: 据比价网站Zor的数据显示，尽管最便宜和最贵的保险产品之间的价格差距显著扩大，但今年荷兰更换医疗保险公司的人数却有所减少。

title: Traffic congestion increased this year, despite new roads
title_zh: 尽管修建了新道路，但今年的交通拥堵情况仍然加剧。
description: The total length and duration of traffic jams in the Netherlands increased this year, despite the opening of several new...
description_zh: 尽管今年荷兰开通了多条新的道路，但交通拥堵的总长度和持续时间仍然有所增加……

title: Most Dutch goat farms too close to schools and care facilities, raising health risks
title_zh: 大多数荷兰山羊养殖场距离学校和护理机构太近，增加了健康风险。
description: A majority of goat farms in the Netherlands are situated so close to schools, childcare centers, and care facilities that nearby residents face elevated health risks, according to a new analysis re
description_zh: 一项新的分析显示，荷兰的大多数山羊养殖场都位于学校、托儿中心和护理机构附近，这给附近居民带来了更高的健康风险。

title: Netherlands sees sunniest Christmas on record, coldest in 25 years
title_zh: 荷兰迎来有记录以来最晴朗的圣诞节，也是25年来最冷的圣诞节
description: The Netherlands experienced its sunniest Christmas on record, while also marking the coldest holiday since 2000, meteorologists reported.
description_zh: 气象学家报告称，荷兰经历了有记录以来阳光最充足的圣诞节，但同时也迎来了自 2000 年以来最冷的圣诞节。

title: Dutch traffic jams up 3% in 2025; Drenthe sees 85% spike due to German border checks
title_zh: 预计到2025年，荷兰交通拥堵将增加3%；由于德国边境检查，德伦特省交通拥堵将激增85%。
description: Traffic congestion in the Netherlands rose by 3 percent in 2025 compared with 2024, according to the ANWB, based on TomTom data.
description_zh: 根据荷兰交通运输协会 (ANWB) 基于 TomTom 数据得出的结论，2025 年荷兰的交通拥堵情况比 2024 年增加了 3%。

title: Fire Service chair warns public: Respect first responders during last year of fireworks
title_zh: 消防局主席警告公众：在烟花表演的最后一年，请尊重急救人员
description: With just four days until New Year’s Eve, Dutch Fire Service chair Jolanda Trijselaar urged the public to celebrate safely and respect emergency responders during what will be the
description_zh: 距离新年夜仅剩四天，荷兰消防局主席约兰达·特里塞拉尔敦促公众安全庆祝，并在新年期间尊重应急救援人员。

title: Explosive material forces evacuation of 50 homes in Lichtenvoorde; Resident arrested
title_zh: 爆炸物迫使利希滕沃尔德 50 户家庭疏散；居民被捕
description: Authorities evacuated around fifty homes Friday afternoon after explosive material was discovered in a Lichtenvoorde residence. Police also arrested a resident of the property.
description_zh: 周五下午，当局在利希滕福尔德一处住宅内发现爆炸物后，疏散了约五十户居民。警方还逮捕了该住宅的一名住户。

title: Two injured in stabbing after rap concert at Rotterdam Ahoy
title_zh: 鹿特丹阿霍伊体育馆说唱音乐会后发生持刀伤人事件，两人受伤。
description: Two people were injured in a stabbing after a concert by rap group Broederliefde at Rotterdam Ahoy on Friday evening, police reported on
description_zh: 警方报告称，周五晚间，在鹿特丹阿霍伊体育馆举行的说唱组合Broederliefde演唱会结束后，发生一起持刀伤人事件，造成两人受伤。

title: Dutch retirees take pension fund to court over missed raises
title_zh: 荷兰退休人员因未获加薪将养老基金告上法庭
description: A group of Dutch retirees is taking legal action against pension funds transitioning to the new pension system, demanding that they pay backlogged pension indexation.
description_zh: 一群荷兰退休人员正在对过渡到新养老金制度的养老基金提起诉讼，要求他们支付拖欠的养老金指数化调整款项。

title: Dutch forensic doctors miss fatal child abuse in up to 10 cases a year
title_zh: 荷兰法医每年漏诊多达10起致命虐童案件
description: Dutch forensic doctors fail to detect fatal child abuse in an estimated five to 10 cases each year, sometimes issuing death certificates for natural causes even though children died from violence,
description_zh: 据估计，荷兰法医每年有 5 到 10 起致命的虐童案件未能发现，有时甚至在儿童死于暴力的情况下，也签发了自然死亡证明。

title: Three killed in separate crashes in Drenthe and Utrecht
title_zh: 德伦特省和乌得勒支省发生两起独立车祸，造成三人死亡。
description: Three people were killed Friday afternoon in separate traffic accidents in Drenthe and Utrecht, police said.Two of the fatal crashes occurred in Drenthe.
description_zh: 警方称，周五下午，德伦特省和乌得勒支省分别发生两起交通事故，造成三人死亡。其中两起致命事故发生在德伦特省。

title: Mist and ice lead to difficult conditions on northern roads
title_zh: 雾气和冰雪导致北部道路路况恶劣。
description: The KNMI weather bureau on Saturday issued a code yellow weather warning for much of the country because of a...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）气象局周六对该国大部分地区发布了黄色天气预警，原因是……

title: “Racism in the Netherlands…it’s all so subtle”: Tahrim Ramdjan
title_zh: “荷兰的种族主义……一切都如此隐蔽”：塔赫里姆·拉姆詹
description: Unlike the stereotypical Dutchman, Tahrim Ramdjan was not raised on a bike. His commute to secondary school – from multicultural...
description_zh: 与人们印象中的荷兰人不同，塔赫里姆·拉姆詹并非从小骑自行车长大。他每天骑车去中学——从多元文化的……

title: Emergency doctors brace for “exceptionally busy” final fireworks night
title_zh: 急诊医生严阵以待，迎接“异常繁忙”的最后一场烟花之夜。
description: Emergency doctors are bracing for a hectic New Year’s Eve, the final night Dutch residents can legally use consumer fireworks before
description_zh: 急诊医生们正严阵以待，准备迎接一个繁忙的新年夜，因为这是荷兰居民在新年夜前最后一晚可以合法燃放消费级烟花。

title: Icy roads and sudden dense fog prompt code yellow warning in much of the Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰大部分地区因路面结冰和突发浓雾发布了黄色预警。
description: The Dutch weather serviceKNMIissued a code yellow warning early Saturday for hazardous road conditions and dense fog acr
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）周六早些时候发布了黄色预警，提醒公众注意危险的路况和浓雾。

title: Volt Amsterdam proposes floating student campus and youth reforms
title_zh: Volt Amsterdam提出水上学生校园和青年改革方案
description: Volt Amsterdam has unveiled a municipal election program aimed at improving life for young residents in the city.
description_zh: Volt Amsterdam 公布了一项市政选举计划，旨在改善该市年轻居民的生活。

title: Dutch economy sees strong Q3 growth; Jobs increase by 41,000
title_zh: 荷兰经济第三季度强劲增长；新增就业岗位4.1万个。
description: The Dutch economy expanded by 0.5 percent in the third quarter compared with the previous quarter, according to a new estimate from Statistics Netherlands.
description_zh: 根据荷兰统计局最新估计，荷兰经济第三季度环比增长0.5%。

title: Basketball coach convicted of secretly recording kids in locker room; No more jail time
title_zh: 篮球教练因在更衣室秘密录制学生视频而被定罪；无需再服刑
description: The Noord-Holland District Court has sentenced a basketball coach to 180 hours of community service for filming boys in a changing room in Landsmeer.
description_zh: 北荷兰地方法院判处一名篮球教练 180 小时社区服务，罪名是在兰斯梅尔的一间更衣室里偷拍男孩。

title: Amsterdam Mayor Femke Halsema, actor Jeroen Krabbe to speak at Holocaust Remembrance
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长 Femke Halsema 和演员 Jeroen Krabbe 将在大屠杀纪念活动上发表讲话
description: Actor Jeroen Krabbé and Amsterdam Mayor Femke Halsema will speak on Sunday, January 25, during the National Holocaust Remembrance Day, NOS reports.
description_zh: 据 NOS 报道，演员 Jeroen Krabbé 和阿姆斯特丹市长 Femke Halsema 将于 1 月 25 日（星期日）国家大屠杀纪念日期间发表讲话。

title: Two killed in car accident on N242 in Zuid-Scharwoude
title_zh: 在 Zuid-Scharwoude 的 N242 公路上发生车祸，两人丧生
description: Two people lost their lives on Friday morning after an accident on the N242 in Zuid-Scharwoude.
description_zh: 周五上午，在南沙尔沃德的N242公路上发生一起交通事故，造成两人死亡。

title: Tilburg youths arrested for targeting emergency workers, police with fireworks
title_zh: 蒂尔堡青少年因用烟花袭击紧急救援人员和警察而被捕
description: Youths in Tilburg targeted emergency responders and a parked police vehicle with fireworks on Wednesday evening, police reported on Friday.
description_zh: 警方周五报告称，周三晚上，蒂尔堡的青少年用烟花袭击了紧急救援人员和一辆停放的警车。

title: Dutch man arrested in Vienna after high-speed chase; Faces 12-year sentence in NL
title_zh: 荷兰男子在维也纳高速追逐后被捕；面临荷兰最高12年刑期
description: Authorities in Vienna have detained a 23-year-old Dutch national who was the subject of a European arrest warrant.
description_zh: 维也纳当局拘留了一名23岁的荷兰公民，该男子是欧洲逮捕令的对象。

title: Heemskerk minor in custody after major fireworks seizure
title_zh: 海姆斯凯尔克一名未成年人因重大烟花事故被拘留
description: A minor in Heemskerk was arrested earlier this week after authorities found heavy fireworks and drugs in his possession, according to the police report.
description_zh: 据警方报告，本周早些时候，海姆斯凯尔克一名未成年人因持有大型烟花和毒品而被捕。

title: Icy conditions in tunnels causing road closures and lane reductions
title_zh: 隧道内结冰导致道路封闭和车道减少
description: Slippery road conditions have occurred on multiple roads in the Netherlands, particularly in and near tunnels, where leaking water has frozen.
description_zh: 荷兰多条道路出现路面湿滑的情况，尤其是在隧道内及附近，这是由于漏水结冰造成的。

title: Walking the canals Instead of dining out: tourists spending less in Amsterdam
title_zh: 游客选择在阿姆斯特丹运河漫步，而不是外出就餐，从而减少开支。
description: Tourists are spending less and less money in Amsterdam.
description_zh: 游客在阿姆斯特丹的消费越来越少。

title: Thousands left without water in Drachten after main pipeline break; Issue now resolved
title_zh: 德拉赫滕主输水管道破裂，数千人断水；问题现已解决
description: Thousands of residents in Drachten experienced a water outage after a main pipe on Noorderhogeweg broke, according to Fryslân Veilig.
description_zh: 据 Fryslân Veilig 称，Noorderhogeweg 的一根主管道破裂后，德拉赫滕的数千名居民遭遇停水。

title: Man arrested after car ploughs into people following argument in Ede
title_zh: 埃德市一名男子因与人争吵后驾车冲撞人群而被捕
description: Four people were taken to the hospital on Christmas Day after a man drove into a group of people as a result of an argument in Ede. One man has been arrested by the police after the incident.
description_zh: 圣诞节当天，在埃德镇，一名男子因与人争吵后驾车冲入人群，造成四人被送往医院。事发后，警方逮捕了一名男子。

title: Two frosty days and the Dutch are out in force on their skates
title_zh: 连续两天寒风凛冽，荷兰人纷纷穿上冰鞋出来滑冰。
description: The first speed skating marathon on natural ice this season will be held on Friday evening in Winterswijk, after organisers...
description_zh: 本赛季首场天然冰上速滑马拉松将于周五晚在温特斯韦克举行，组织者……

title: Dutch destinations: revisit our 2025 reviews for weekends away
title_zh: 荷兰旅游目的地：重温我们 2025 年的周末度假攻略
description: There’s a lot more to the Netherlands than the big cities. Here’s a recap of this year’s Dutch destinations –...
description_zh: 荷兰的魅力远不止于大城市。以下是今年荷兰旅游目的地的回顾……

title: Fun, fit and friends: the benefits of joining a sports club
title_zh: 乐趣、健康和友谊：加入体育俱乐部的好处
description: New Year is just around the corner, which means so are those pesky resolutions. But if you’re looking for a...
description_zh: 新年将至，那些烦人的新年计划也即将到来。但如果你正在寻找……

title: Winterswijk to host season’s first natural ice marathon on Friday evening
title_zh: 温特斯韦克将于周五晚举办本季首场天然冰上马拉松比赛。
description: Winterswijk will host the season’s first natural ice marathon on Friday evening.
description_zh: 温特斯韦克将于周五晚上举办本季首场天然冰上马拉松比赛。

title: Shooting in Amsterdam leaves one injured; Authorities arrest three
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹发生枪击事件，一人受伤；当局逮捕三人。
description: A man was left wounded after a shooting in Amsterdam on Thursday evening. Police received reports of a shooting on the Vlaardingenlaan in Slotervaart at around 10:15 p.m., Het Parool reported.
description_zh: 周四晚间，阿姆斯特丹发生枪击事件，一名男子受伤。据《Het Parool》报道，警方于当晚10点15分左右接到报案，称在Slotervaart的Vlaardingenlaan发生枪击事件。

title: Shrimp fishers leave industry as buyout scheme reduces fleet
title_zh: 由于收购计划导致船队规模缩减，虾渔民纷纷退出该行业。
description: Many shrimp fishers in the Netherlands are ceasing operations. Of the 161 licensed vessels, nearly a third are expected to be phased out.
description_zh: 荷兰许多虾类渔民正在停止作业。在161艘获得许可的渔船中，预计近三分之一将逐步退出市场。

title: Jumbo brings back Douwe Egberts coffee after price dispute
title_zh: 价格纠纷后 Jumbo 重新推出 Douwe Egberts 咖啡
description: Supermarket chain Jumbo announced Wednesday that restrictions on the sale of Douwe Egberts products at its stores are over.
description_zh: 超市连锁店 Jumbo 周三宣布，其门店对 Douwe Egberts 产品的销售限制已经解除。

title: Coldest Christmas Day since 1994 brought winter’s first ice day and overnight frost
title_zh: 这是自1994年以来最冷的圣诞节，带来了冬季的第一场冰冻和夜间霜冻。
description: Temperatures in De Bilt, the location used as the national benchmark for official weather measurements in the Netherlands by the KNMI, did not rise above zero at any point on Christmas Day.
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所 (KNMI) 用作荷兰官方气象测量国家基准的德比尔特 (De Bilt) 的气温在圣诞节当天任何时候都没有超过零度。

title: Dom Tower welcomes 100,000th visitor in 2025, setting new record
title_zh: 2025年，多姆塔迎来了第10万名游客，创下新纪录
description: The Dom Tower in Utrecht welcomed its 100,000th visitor of the year last Sunday, breaking the record set in 2017, when 92,000 people climbed the tower.
description_zh: 上周日，乌得勒支大教堂塔迎来了今年的第 10 万名游客，打破了 2017 年创下的 9.2 万人登塔的纪录。

title: 55% sent physical Christmas cards this year, while 23% opt for texts
title_zh: 今年有55%的人寄送了实体圣诞贺卡，而23%的人选择发送短信。
description: This year, 58 percent of Dutch people say they send a Christmas card, down from 63 percent last year, according to new figures from the
description_zh: 根据最新数据，今年有58%的荷兰人表示会寄送圣诞贺卡，低于去年的63%。

title: Male Asian elephant calf born at Amsterdam’s Artis Zoo; Public to name newborn
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹阿提斯动物园诞下一头雄性亚洲象幼崽；公众将为新生象命名
description: A male elephant calf was born on Wednesday evening at Artis, the Amsterdam zoo, giving the park a rare Christmas gift.
description_zh: 周三晚上，阿姆斯特丹动物园 Artis 迎来了一头雄性小象的诞生，给这座动物园带来了一份难得的圣诞礼物。

title: Dutch supermarkets triple meat discounts before Christmas as vegetarian deals fall
title_zh: 圣诞节前，荷兰超市肉类折扣力度加大，而素食折扣力度则有所下降。
description: Dutch supermarkets sharply ramped up meat discounts ahead of Christmas.
description_zh: 圣诞节前夕，荷兰超市大幅提高了肉类折扣力度。

title: 55-year-old volunteer at Rotterdam scout group arrested in child sexual abuse case
title_zh: 鹿特丹童子军团体一名55岁志愿者因涉嫌性侵儿童被捕
description: A 55-year-old man was arrested Monday in Rotterdam in connection with a child sexual abuse investigation at a local scouting organization,
description_zh: 周一，一名55岁男子在鹿特丹被捕，他涉嫌与当地一家童子军组织发生的儿童性虐待案有关。

title: Two men killed in separate Christmas Eve crashes in Zwartsluis and Maasdijk
title_zh: 平安夜，两名男子在兹瓦茨路易斯和马斯代克分别发生的车祸中丧生
description: Two men were killed in separate traffic accidents in the Netherlands on Christmas Eve, authorities reported.
description_zh: 据当局报道，圣诞前夜，荷兰发生两起交通事故，两名男子不幸身亡。

title: From starters to desserts: Ready-made Christmas meals on the rise in Dutch supermarkets
title_zh: 从开胃菜到甜点：荷兰超市的圣诞预制餐销量正在上升
description: Driven by consumers’ desire for convenience, the majority of supermarkets in the Netherlands now offer pre-made Christmas dishes, from starters to desserts, according to an
description_zh: 受消费者对便利性的需求驱动，荷兰大多数超市现在都提供预制圣诞菜肴，从开胃菜到甜点应有尽有。

title: Netherlands joins 13 nations in condemning Israel’s approval of 19 West Bank settlements
title_zh: 荷兰与另外13个国家联名谴责以色列批准在西岸修建19个定居点。
description: The Netherlands has joined 13 other countries in condemning Israel’s approval of 19 new settlements in the occupied West Bank, warning that the decision violates international law and risks further
description_zh: 荷兰与其他13个国家一道谴责以色列批准在被占领的西岸地区新建19个定居点，并警告称该决定违反国际法，且存在进一步破坏的风险。

title: King Willem-Alexander expresses concern, hope for new generations in Christmas speech
title_zh: 威廉-亚历山大国王在圣诞致辞中表达了对新一代的关切和希望
description: Dutch King Willem-Alexander focused his 13th annual Christmas Day address on the need to cherish what unites the country.
description_zh: 荷兰国王威廉-亚历山大在第13届年度圣诞节致辞中，着重强调了珍惜国家团结的必要性。

title: Police boost patrols and install cameras after sexual assaults in Diemen and Weesp
title_zh: 迪门和韦斯普发生性侵事件后，警方加强巡逻并安装摄像头。
description: Authorities have stepped up safety measures along the Kanaaldijk in Diemen and Weesp following multiple reports of sexual assaults in recent weeks.
description_zh: 最近几周，迪门和韦斯普的卡纳尔代克沿线发生多起性侵犯事件，当局已加强了安全措施。

title: Full text and video of King Willem-Alexander's 2025 Christmas address in English
title_zh: 威廉-亚历山大国王2025年圣诞致辞全文及视频（英文版）
description: King Willem-Alexander delivered his annual Christmas address on Thursday with a speech focused on themes of unity, and valuing that which binds people in a society.
description_zh: 威廉-亚历山大国王于周四发表了一年一度的圣诞致辞，他的讲话重点是团结以及珍视将人们联系在一起的社会纽带。

title: NL joins others in condemning Israeli West Bank expansion
title_zh: NL与其他国家一道谴责以色列在西岸的扩张。
description: The Netherlands is one of 14 countries to sign a joint declaration condemning the Israeli government’s decision to approve 19...
description_zh: 荷兰是签署联合声明谴责以色列政府批准19项制裁措施的14个国家之一……

title: Dutch king reflects on children, community in Christmas message
title_zh: 荷兰国王在圣诞致辞中谈及儿童和社区
description: King Willem-Alexander used his annual Christmas message to urge people to take care of what binds society together, delivering a...
description_zh: 威廉-亚历山大国王在一年一度的圣诞致辞中敦促人们珍惜维系社会团结的纽带，并发表了……

title: Natural ice rinks open across Netherlands on cold Christmas Day
title_zh: 寒冷的圣诞节，荷兰各地的天然冰场开放。
description: Residents across the Netherlands may be able to take advantage of cold temperatures on Christmas Day as natural ice rinks are opening in several locations, including De Lier, Zeist, and Noordwijk.
description_zh: 荷兰各地的居民或许可以在圣诞节当天享受寒冷的气温，因为包括德利尔、泽斯特和诺德韦克在内的几个地方的天然溜冰场都将开放。

title: Flu cases fall further, but chickenpox is quickly rising, health officials say
title_zh: 卫生官员表示，流感病例进一步下降，但水痘病例正在迅速上升。
description: Dutch health officials report a decline in flu cases, even as chickenpox infections among children rise sharply.
description_zh: 荷兰卫生官员报告称，流感病例有所下降，但儿童水痘感染病例却急剧上升。

title: Dutch authorities warn of unsafe party buses on highways
title_zh: 荷兰当局警告高速公路上存在不安全的派对巴士
description: The Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) and Royal Dutch Transport (KNV) issued a stark warning to anyone planning to celebrate on a party bus.
description_zh: 人类环境与交通监察局 (ILT) 和荷兰皇家交通局 (KNV) 向任何计划在派对巴士上庆祝的人发出严厉警告。

title: Pre-Christmas freeze sends hundreds of homeless to emergency "winter cold shelters"
title_zh: 圣诞节前的严寒天气导致数百名无家可归者涌入紧急“冬季避寒中心”。
description: A sharp drop in temperatures has pushed several hundred homeless people into emergency winter shelters across the Netherlands over the past two nights, while Apeldoorn has announced an emergency sh
description_zh: 过去两晚，荷兰气温骤降，数百名无家可归者被迫涌入各地紧急冬季避难所，而阿珀尔多伦也宣布启动紧急避难措施。

title: Eritrean human smuggler extradited to Netherlands, faces charges of torture, extortion
title_zh: 厄立特里亚人口走私犯被引渡至荷兰，面临酷刑和敲诈勒索指控
description: Kidane H., a 41-year-old Eritrean accused of leading a notorious human smuggling network, was extradited from the United Arab Emirates to the Netherlands on Wednesday.
description_zh: 41岁的厄立特里亚人基达内·H被指控领导一个臭名昭著的人口走私网络，于周三从阿拉伯联合酋长国被引渡到荷兰。

title: Video: Hengevelde residents learn sign language to include 4-year-old boy in community
title_zh: 视频：亨格维尔德居民学习手语，以便让4岁男孩融入社区
description: Residents of Hengevelde have learned sign language to help four-year-old Gijs Bloemen, who has a hearing impairment, communicate in daily life.
description_zh: 亨格维尔德的居民学习了手语，以帮助患有听力障碍的四岁男孩吉斯·布洛门在日常生活中进行交流。

title: Resident killed in overnight house fire in Akkrum
title_zh: 阿克鲁姆一户民宅夜间发生火灾，一名居民丧生。
description: A resident died in a fierce overnight house fire early Thursday after flames tore through a semi-detached home on the Koarte Mient in Akkrum,
description_zh: 周四凌晨，阿克鲁姆 Koarte Mient 一栋半独立式住宅发生猛烈火灾，一名居民不幸身亡。

title: Netherlands tops EU in Christmas goods trade, leading in both exports and imports
title_zh: 荷兰在欧盟圣诞商品贸易中位居榜首，出口和进口均领先。
description: The Netherlands leads the European Union in exports of Christmas goods.
description_zh: 荷兰是欧盟圣诞商品出口量最大的国家。

title: Churches seek support from non-believers through new fundraising project
title_zh: 教会通过新的筹款项目寻求非信徒的支持
description: Churches have been struggling with rising costs for heating, salary increases, and maintenance. A project, named Actie Kerkbalans, has been launched to help churches receive more donations.
description_zh: 教堂一直面临着取暖费、工资上涨和维护费用不断增加的困境。一项名为“教堂援助行动”（Actie Kerkbalans）的项目已经启动，旨在帮助教堂获得更多捐款。

title: Dutch business investments slip 0.4 percent in October; Outlook for 2026 still positive
title_zh: 荷兰10月份企业投资下滑0.4%；2026年展望依然乐观。
description: Investments by Dutch companies decreased slightly in October, falling 0.4 percent compared with the same month last year, according to Statistics Netherlands.
description_zh: 荷兰统计局数据显示，10月份荷兰企业的投资额略有下降，比去年同期下降了0.4%。

title: Online supermarket Crisp set to post first profit this month
title_zh: 在线超市Crisp有望在本月实现首次盈利
description: Online supermarket Crisp expects to make a profit for the first time this month, once adjustments are made for taxes and other factors.
description_zh: 在线超市 Crisp 预计本月将首次实现盈利，前提是扣除税收和其他因素的影响。

title: Arnhem takes measures after devastating city center fire
title_zh: 阿纳姆市中心发生毁灭性火灾后，阿纳姆采取应对措施
description: The municipality of Arnhem has introduced new fire safety measures in response to a devastatingfire that s
description_zh: 为应对一场毁灭性的大火，阿纳姆市政府出台了新的消防安全措施。

title: Three fatal road accidents in Hoek van Holland, Groningen, and Rotterdam
title_zh: 在霍克范霍兰德、格罗宁根和鹿特丹发生三起致命交通事故
description: There were three fatal traffic accidents on the roads throughout the Netherlands on Tuesday evening and Wednesday morning. The three victims were all relatively young, with ages of 18, 22, and 25.
description_zh: 周二晚间至周三上午，荷兰各地道路上共发生三起致命交通事故。三名遇难者都比较年轻，年龄分别为18岁、22岁和25岁。

title: More Dutch households planning fancy Christmas dinners than gourmetten hot plates
title_zh: 计划准备精致圣诞晚餐的荷兰家庭比准备美味热菜的家庭更多。
description: This Christmas holiday, households in the Netherlands are more likely to host fancier multi-course dinners, as opposed to the more traditional meals using a gourmet, but only slightly.
description_zh: 今年圣诞假期，荷兰的家庭更有可能举办更精致的多道菜晚餐，而不是像以往那样请美食家烹制更传统的餐点，但这种趋势并不明显。

title: Eredivisie stadiums nearly full as attendance hits 10-year high
title_zh: 荷甲联赛球场几乎座无虚席，上座率创十年新高
description: Eredivisie football is seeing a resurgence in attendance.
description_zh: 荷甲足球联赛的观众人数正在回升。

title: One killed, others still critically hurt after car rammed Nunspeet parade watchers
title_zh: 汽车冲撞努恩斯皮特游行观看者，造成一人死亡，多人重伤。
description: One of thenine injured when a car collided into a groupof people waiting to watch a parade
description_zh: 一辆汽车撞入一群等待观看游行的人群，造成九人受伤，其中一人受伤。

title: Dutch deficit already at €11 billion this year; Third-worst in ten years
title_zh: 荷兰今年的财政赤字已达110亿欧元，为十年来第三高。
description: Dutch government spending in the first three quarters of this year exceeded revenues by 11 billion euros.
description_zh: 今年前三个季度，荷兰政府支出比收入高出 110 亿欧元。

title: Bacteria detection prompts 3-day boil order in Amersfoort; Grocery shelves emptied
title_zh: 阿默斯福特市因检测出细菌而发布为期三天的食品煮沸令；超市货架被抢购一空。
description: A large number of people living in Amersfoort may have to quickly change their Christmas plans, as the enterococcus bacteria was detected in the drinking water system in one part of the city.
description_zh: 阿默斯福特市许多居民可能不得不迅速改变他们的圣诞节计划，因为该市部分地区的饮用水系统中检测到了肠球菌。

title: RSV vaccine cuts infant ICU admissions by up to 80 percent
title_zh: RSV疫苗可使婴儿重症监护室入院率降低高达80%
description: This season, only 22 infants with Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) have required intensive care, a sharp drop from the historical average of 200, representing a decline of between 66 and 80 percen
description_zh: 本季仅有22名感染呼吸道合胞病毒（RSV）的婴儿需要重症监护，与历史平均水平200例相比大幅下降，降幅达66%至80%。

title: Nearly half of supermarkets open on Christmas; Most open on Boxing Day
title_zh: 近一半的超市圣诞节营业；大多数超市节礼日也营业。
description: Nearly half of all supermarkets are open on Christmas Day. By Boxing Day, roughly 90 percent of stores are available for quick shopping trips.
description_zh: 圣诞节当天，近一半的超市都会营业。到了节礼日，大约90%的超市都会开放，方便顾客快速购物。

title: Dutch authorities reject one in four F2 fireworks, safety concerns remain
title_zh: 荷兰当局拒绝接收四分之一的F2级烟花，安全隐患依然存在。
description: The Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) rejected 25.8 percent of F2 consumer fireworks tested this year, a notable drop from last year’s 40.9 percent failure rate.
description_zh: 今年，人类环境与运输监察局 (ILT) 对 F2 级消费烟花进行了测试，结果显示不合格率为 25.8%，较去年的 40.9% 不合格率显著下降。

title: Video: Cat rescued from car's engine compartment after 70-kilometer drive
title_zh: 视频：猫咪被困汽车引擎舱70公里后获救
description: A cat was rescued in Purmerend on Tuesday after it had traveled 70 kilometers under the hood of a car. The cat was taken directly to the veterinarian by the animal ambulance for a check-up.
description_zh: 周二，一只猫在普尔默伦德获救，此前它藏身于一辆汽车引擎盖下，行驶了70公里。随后，这只猫被动物救护车直接送往兽医处进行检查。

title: Strong wind chill of -12°C means very cold, but sunny Christmas holiday week
title_zh: 强风寒效应使体感温度降至零下12摄氏度，意味着非常寒冷，但圣诞假期周阳光明媚。
description: Those out and about in the Netherlands during the holiday-shortened week will experience a wind chill making the air temperature feel well below freezing.
description_zh: 在荷兰，由于假期缩短，外出活动的人们会感受到风寒效应，体感温度会远低于冰点。

title: Uber Eats facing one-month ban on deliveries in Amsterdam over illegal couriers
title_zh: Uber Eats因非法送餐员面临在阿姆斯特丹一个月的送餐禁令。
description: Uber Eats is facing a potential one-month ban on offering delivery services in the Amsterdam region amid continued allegations the platform is using food couriers who do not hold valid work permits
description_zh: 由于不断有指控称Uber Eats平台使用没有有效工作许可的送餐员，该平台可能面临在阿姆斯特丹地区提供送餐服务一个月的禁令。

title: Household incomes rise 3.5% in third quarter amid higher wages and social payments
title_zh: 受工资和社会福利支出增加的影响，第三季度家庭收入增长3.5%。
description: Household incomes rose by an average of 3.5 percent in the third quarter compared with a year earlier.
description_zh: 第三季度家庭收入比上年同期平均增长了3.5%。
